channel.title: Muyideen Morenigbade — DevOps & Cloud Engineer
channel.description: Field notes on Azure, Terraform, OpenShift and CI/CD from building and running cloud platforms.

item.title: How this site works: Azure Static Web Apps, Terraform and OIDC
item.description: The portfolio you are reading is its own case study — static frontend on Azure Static Web Apps, infrastructure in Terraform, keyless deploys via GitHub Actions OIDC, and a serverless visitor counter on Table Storage.

item.title: Automate User and Group management in Linux using Bash script
item.description: Streamline User Creation, Group Creation and Assignment, and Password Management in a Linux Environment..

item.title: How to Migrate Azure API Management Instance to Stv2 Platform
item.description: How to migrate APIM instance injected in a virtual network..

item.title: How to build and deploy container images in Azure
item.description: Build and deploy container images in the cloud with Azure Container Registry Tasks

item.title: How to create a Linux (Ubuntu) Virtual Machine in Azure
item.description: Creating an Ubuntu Virtual Machine on Azure and connecting to it.
